textByHash.9cb000b777366c69a0a2c16e90410d2d50b780db: Sarah Corvo? She lives in the house next to the bank.
textByHash.f73605ec43edeaa3efb494500ad404b267513aca: I'm sorry, but it's hard to believe that a mortal could be interested in helping us.
textByHash.07bca4c1f268be538da97ba85832a045cba032f9: Why are you wearing that bedsheet? If you're trying to pretend to be one of us, you're not fooling anybody - you're not even green!!
textByHash.b184a0d59d4f390a347ca991690d8c9c72737cfa: I'll do anything that annoys Necrovarus.
textByHash.486b6e01fb39333ed45ebb2fd73c406657f42bdb: Yes! It's about time somebody did something about Necrovarus.
textByHash.00666fabbae0c2a192525e97a1de6685d2c867af: I will if you make it worth my while...
textByHash.6166ada6415dc2d8c473b30df32a13e0ef053704: You scratch my back and I'll scratch yours...
textByHash.d7e4184e15df14fede4157c682c2cbdabd4f2b1c: I will have you know that I am a fervent supporter of Necrovarus.
textByHash.74ea4eb994010eb3621a31e40df9a5060fa19c37: How dare you accost me in the street?
textByHash.0f2d82821f7dc8f80f7d8f9beb0eced00ecf8e2c: I don't have time for this nonsense.
textByHash.547fd5cd7da25ec5878ea5d7218fc44b8f36dbee: You only just asked me the same thing! Leave me alone - I've had my say!
textByHash.186236f27c42405cd6f054b15dda1e610b115734: We do not talk to the warm-bloods.
textByHash.66c8c41fef2839b8e63388d8265adb4bcb8c8eda: Why did we have to listen to that maniacal priest?
textByHash.50512cdb80afd430b2c946f33879cefaaaab1efb: This cold wind blows right through you, doesn't it?
textByHash.61ffd26da8c4ffd20d2c58e4ae03c21265b8204e: Worship the Ectofuntus all you want, but don't bother us, human.
